title: Notification
text: NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 17th June, 2022 8.0. 2803(E).-ln exercise of the powers co nferred by sub-section (5) of section 23 of the Representation of the People Act , 1950 (43 of 1950), the Centra l Govcmmcnt hereby notifie s the I st Apri l, 2023 as the date on or before which every person whose name is included in the electoral roll may intimate his Aadhaar number in accordance with the said section. [F. No. H-11019 /4/2019-Leg.lI] DIWAKAR SfNGH, Jt. Secy. and Legis lative Counsel -- 1 of 1 --
